zh.lifeSummary: 當Konrad Ier von Kyrburg於大約1116年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀吉爾吉爾卡包格時，他的父親Graf Emich II von Kyrburg29歲，母親Maria Sophia Von Flonheim25歲。他與Mathilde de Bar結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1173年之後在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀吉爾卡包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Konrad Ier von Kyrburg于大约1116年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀吉爾吉爾卡包格时，他的父亲Graf Emich II von Kyrburg29岁，母亲Maria Sophia Von Flonheim25岁。他与Mathilde de Bar结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1173年之后在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀吉爾卡包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Konrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: back-formation from Yiddish Iserl (a metathesized form of Israel), the final -l having been taken as a hypocoristic ending.

en.lifeSummary: When Konrad Ier von Kyrburg was born about 1116, in Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Graf Emich II von Kyrburg, was 29 and his mother, Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, was 25. He married Mathilde de Bar. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1173, in Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Konrad Ier von Kyrburg est né environ 1116, à Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Graf Emich II von Kyrburg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Bar. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1173, à Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Konrad Ier von Kyrburg um 1116 in Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Emich II von Kyrburg 29 und seine Mutter Maria Sophia Von Flonheim 25. Er hat Mathilde de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1173 in Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Konrad Ier von Kyrburg è nato il circa 1116 nel Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Graf Emich II von Kyrburg, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Bar. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1173, nel Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Konrad Ier von Kyrburgが約1116年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレウズナチキルンキルンクイルブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Emich II von Kyrburgは29歳，母Maria Sophia Von Flonheimは25歳であった。Mathilde de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1173年以後にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチキルンクイルブルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Konrad Ier von Kyrburg(이)가 대략 1116년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레우즈나치 커 커 키르버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Emich II von Kyrburg(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Sophia Von Flonheim(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1173년 이후 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 커 키르버그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Konrad Ier von Kyrburg nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Graf Emich II von Kyrburg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Bar. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1173, em Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Konrad Ier von Kyrburg родился около 1116 г. в местности кирбург, кирн, кирн, креузнач, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Graf Emich II von Kyrburg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Bar. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1173 г. в местности кирбург, кирн, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Konrad Ier von Kyrburg nació aproximadamente 1116, en Kyrburg, Kirn, Kirn, Kreuznach, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Graf Emich II von Kyrburg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maria Sophia Von Flonheim, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Bar. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1173, en Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
